quote: The baseline assessment gave us exactly what we needed — a clear, honest picture of where our strategy documentation stood and a concrete path forward. The scoring framework made it impossible to hide behind vague notions of 'we have a strategy'.

Paul-Mattias helped us see that we had all the pieces — strong culture, ambitious initiatives, real entrepreneurial energy — but we were missing the structure to connect them. The strategy house framework changed how our entire leadership team thinks about our direction.

What sets Strategic Popoltastic apart is the co-creative approach. This wasn't a consultant delivering a deck and walking away — it was a genuine partnership where we built the strategy together. The 85/15 model shows they believe in what they deliver.
